calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Sabas Pintor, re: failure to appear at the November 5, 2001 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar. Sabas Pintor, dismissed on 11/27/01. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2001 Continued To Jan-10-02 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
